sglang.title: Refactor: move all quantization-related code to `srt/layer/quantization`
sglang.author: ch-wan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Several users have encountered circular import errors when they directly import some functions or classes in SGLang (e.g., #2386, #7919). These stem from the disorganized structure between our linear/MoE layers and quantization methods. Some quantization methods are implemented in layer

sglang.author: yuan-luo
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

This PR is to introduce block / warp scan algorithm in fused MoE path moe_align_block_size_kernel  which gains approximately 10% speedup.
Here is the benchmark result.
Note: num_experts >= 128 appliable to this PR. num_experts < 128 appliable to moe_align_block_size_small_batch_expert_ke

sglang.author: ziqifan617
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
It is confusing to see error msg like below when enable hi-cache. The fix is to account for the additional 10 GB reserved memory.
ValueError: Not enough host memory available. Requesting 40.00 GB but only have 44.87 GB free. Please reduce the size of the hierarchical cache.

sglang.title: feat: add production metric for retracted requests due to insufficient kvcache
sglang.author: aftersnow
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Add metric for tracking the number of requests retracted from the running batch due to insufficient kvcache. Too many requests retraction can impact throughput, so we hope to introduce a metric to monitor these, providing more information for configuration adjustments.

sglang.title: load draft model fix
sglang.author: yilian49
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When loading deepseek v3, post_load_weights function called in loader.py does not pass in a is_nextn argument which reports the following error when loading DeepseekModelNextN models.
Modifications
Add a check for if model architecture is "DeepseekV3ForCausalLMNextN" and pass in is_nextn

sglang.title: [CPU][Llama4] Fix Llama4 MoE inputs with "apply_router_weight_on_input"
sglang.author: jianan-gu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes the support of "apply_router_weight_on_input" for llama4 model for the CPU path.
Differing from other MoE models (Qwen3/DeepSeek), llama4 applies the topk weight before MoE calculation. Here we follow the logic to revise the current CPU path, and added TODO to fuse this processing in M

sglang.title: [Quantization][w8a8_int8] Fix weight loading issue for w8a8_int8 path with "ignore" layer list in quantization config
sglang.author: jianan-gu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
This PR is referring to the way of compressed_tensors loading format from the quantization config, adding ignore  list for w8a8_int8 path, which is necessary since models may not be fully quantized.
For example, W8A8 models will contain the ignore list: https://huggingface.co/nytopop/Qwen3-30B-A3B.w

vllm.title: [Performance] Performance improvements in non-blockwise fp8 CUTLASS MoE
vllm.author: ElizaWszola
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR introduces a couple performance improvements to non-blockwise fp8 CUTLASS MoE. The improvements are:

Bringing back pre-calculation of ab_strides and c_strides. It had been disabled due to PPLX codepath compatibility issues which are now resolved.
Faster kernels for shuffling hidden_states,

vllm.title: On environments where numa cannot be detected we get 0
vllm.author: ericcurtin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This leads to a divide by zero:
cpu_count // numa_size
this can happen in virtualized environments, if this happens, treat the same as if we dont have numa or psutil installed.

vllm.author: wenscarl
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR covers:

Integrates Flashinfer NVFP4 cutlass MoE kernel from flashinfer-ai/flashinfer#1113, which can be enabled with env var VLLM_USE_FLASHINFER_MOE=1. It supports


DP + EP
TP + EP
DP + TP + EP


Refactor cutlass_moe_fp4 to modular kernel structure. cutlass_moe_fp4 backend supports DP or T
